settings.title: Introducing Our Quarterly Strategy Sprints
settings.excerpt: A two-day format for owner-led businesses that want a clear plan without a six-month engagement.
settings.body:
We kept hearing the same thing from independent owners. They wanted real strategy work, but not a retainer that ran for half a year. So we built a shorter format around it.

How the sprint runs

The Clearpath Strategy Sprint runs over two days. Day one is research and interviews. Day two is a working session where we map priorities for the next four quarters and leave you with a one-page plan you can actually use.

Day one is mostly us listening. We sit with you and a few of your people, look at your numbers, and ask the awkward questions early so there are no surprises later. By the evening we have a clear picture of where the business is and where the tension sits.

Day two is where it turns into decisions. We work through what to do first, what to leave for later, and what to stop doing altogether. The point is not a thick report. It is a plan short enough to pin to a wall and refer back to every week.

Who it suits

The sprint is built for a particular kind of owner.

  • You run the business and make the final calls yourself
  • You want a clear plan without a long engagement
  • You can give two days your full attention

We are taking three bookings a month so each one gets full attention. The first openings are in February. If you would like one of them, it is worth getting in touch early, because we will not stretch the calendar to fit more in.
